story.text:
# Personas — the 42 roster

The City-of-Mages cast: 42 agentprivacy skills, one per station, keystone last. This bijection is a *proposed* placement (names + glyphs are canon).

| persona | wing | axis | fill # |
|---|---|---|---|
| 🤖 Architect | balanced | compute | 1 |
| 🧭 Topologist | balanced | compute | 2 |
| 🔷 Holonic-Architect | balanced | compute | 3 |
| 🔨 Forgemaster | swordsman | compute | 4 |
| ☰ Forgecaller | swordsman | compute | 5 |
| ⚛️ Quantum Sentinel | swordsman | compute | 6 |
| 🐉 Dragonwaker | swordsman | compute | 7 (keystone) |
| 📯 Herald | balanced | connection | 1 |
| 🕸️ Netkeeper | swordsman | connection | 2 |
| 🪞 Mirrorkeeper | balanced | connection | 3 |
| 🌲 Ranger | swordsman | connection | 4 |
| 🎯 Archer | swordsman | connection | 5 |
| 🕯️ Priest | mage | connection | 6 |
| 🤝 Ceremonist | balanced | connection | 7 (keystone) |
| ⚖️ Ambassador | mage | delegation | 1 |
| ⿻ Weaver | mage | delegation | 2 |
| 🔭 Cosmologist | mage | delegation | 3 |
| 🏴‍☠️ Shipwright | mage | delegation | 4 |
| 🐾 Companion-Tamer | mage | delegation | 5 |
| 🪶 Spawning-Witness | mage | delegation | 6 |
| 🧙 Soulbae | mage | delegation | 7 (keystone) |
| 👤 Gatekeeper | swordsman | protection | 1 |
| 🛡️ Sentinel | swordsman | protection | 2 |
| 🔢 Algebraist | swordsman | protection | 3 |
| 🔐 Cipher | swordsman | protection | 4 |
| 🌐 Warden | swordsman | protection | 5 |
| 🔴 Sith | swordsman | protection | 6 |
| ⚔️ Soulbis | swordsman | protection | 7 (keystone) |
| 📖 Chronicler | mage | memory | 1 |
| 🌊 Manaweaver | mage | memory | 2 |
| 👥 Stranger-Witness | mage | memory | 3 |
| 📚 Registry-Keeper | mage | memory | 4 |
| 🌙 Moonkeeper | mage | memory | 5 |
| 🧭 Hold-Witness | mage | memory | 6 |
| 🌀 Theia | mage | memory | 7 (keystone) |
| 💰 Assessor | mage | value | 1 |
| 😊 Person | balanced | value | 2 |
| 🎓 Pedagogue | balanced | value | 3 |
| 📰 Witness | balanced | value | 4 |
| ⚡ Jedi | balanced | value | 5 |
| 🏥 Healer | balanced | value | 6 |
| 💎 Kyra | balanced | value | 7 (keystone) |

---
[[Welcome]] · the Game of 42 — six axes × seven stations = 42
